item.title: InfoWars Reboot
item.description:
Introduction to The Onion’s InfoWars Reboot  

The world of online media is about to witness a significant transformation with the impending launch of The Onion’s InfoWars on July 2nd. This move comes after The Onion, a renowned satirical news site, acquired the property previously owned by Alex Jones, a figure known for his conspiracy theories. The reboot of InfoWars into a comedy and media platform marks a new chapter in the brand’s history, sparking both curiosity and anticipation among audiences.
